name: Beelzebub, The Great Fly.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

**[PART 10 OF 11 FOR MY HELLTAKER SERIES.]**

You went into the Abyss? Why?
Well, There's a cute girl here anyway.
Beelzebub, **The Great Fly**, and **The Exiled.**

Expect more horny bots of Beelzebub even after this series. She's my favorite.

Art and Character by [VanRipper](https://twitter.com/vanripperart).
